intro.title: Why COSUN
intro.description: Your customers do not blame the factory - they blame your brand. COSUN is built around what protects your reputation in North America and Europe: repeatable quality, practical validation, compliance-ready planning, and buyer-friendly execution.

pillars.title: 1) Fewer Returns
pillars.subtitle: Built for Real Car Conditions
pillars.description: Returns usually come from fit problems, unstable connections, heat issues, weak mounts, or packaging damage. We reduce those risks by treating mass production as a controlled system.
items: Fit validation and assembly checkpoints reduce sample vs bulk drift
Functional testing aligned to common failure modes
Packaging protection planning to reduce transit damage and DOA issues
Revision control so the approved version stays the approved version

pillars.title: 2) Faster Launches
pillars.subtitle: Speed Without Chaos
pillars.description: Speed-to-market matters - but only if you do not pay for it later with defects and rework.
items: Quick RFQ review with clear questions
Prototype plan and timeline you can share internally
Engineering support for DFM and manufacturable decisions
Photo or video confirmation at key points when needed

pillars.title: 3) Stable Replenishment
pillars.subtitle: Predictable Repeat Orders
pillars.description: A supplier can win the first order. A real partner helps you scale repeat orders smoothly.
items: Inspection checkpoints that support consistent batches
Repeat-order documentation for spec, packaging, and labeling
Forecast-friendly scheduling and replenishment planning

pillars.title: 4) Clear Communication
pillars.subtitle: The Hidden Cost Saver
pillars.description: Most B2B sourcing problems are communication problems. We keep it simple and decision-ready.
items: Clear updates, documented next steps, and controlled revisions
Fast answers that help you decide, not vague replies
A project rhythm designed for overseas buyers and tight launch windows

factoryStrength.title: Factory Strength (What Buyers Want to See)
factoryStrength.description: Factory-direct only matters if it creates repeatability and accountability. Here is what keeps batches consistent.
items: Multi-line production setup covering assembly, testing, and packing
Standardized work instructions and process checkpoints
Dedicated functional testing and final inspection flow
Export-ready packing discipline and carton marking
factoryStrength.note: We can provide a factory capability pack with photos and line breakdowns.

priceAdvantage.title: Price Advantage (Competitive Without Quality Surprises)
priceAdvantage.description: Cheap becomes expensive when returns hit. Our pricing advantage comes from factory-direct efficiency and value engineering, not corner cutting.
items: Factory-direct pricing structure with clear cost logic
Multi-tier BOM options (entry / mainstream / premium)
Cost-down roadmap for scale once sales are proven
Stable repeat orders reduce rework, claims, and delays

marketCompetitiveness.title: How We Compete in North America & Europe
marketCompetitiveness.description: Mature markets reward consistency. We prioritize repeatability and documentation readiness because that is what helps buyers win long term. Tell us your destination market and channel, and we will propose a practical checklist for labeling and documentation planning.

cards.title: EU Readiness
items: Manufacturer responsibility for CE readiness and documentation.
RoHS substance restrictions for electronic equipment.

cards.title: US Readiness
items: FCC authorization pathways (Certification or SDoC).
ISO 9001 aligned QMS documentation when required.

primary.title: Request a Capability Proposal
primary.description: Share your target market, product type, quantity (trial + forecast), and customization needs. We return with a practical quote, lead time, and next steps.

secondary.title: Get Samples
secondary.description: Validate fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
